spec_match.rationale: Outstanding, fully compliant and highly targeted spec diagnostics checking CSS.supports(), rule block syncer sheets, and gap spacing parameters.

interactive.rationale: Excellent interactivity. Features two independent width sliders, five live probe badges, and dynamic clientRect row count metrics updating inside timer loops.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Completely aligned with progressive-enhancement best practices for modern CSS features.

edge_cases.rationale: Correctly evaluates CSS selector parser rules and @supports blocks in script tests.

references.rationale: Missing the mandatory reference link to the chromestatus.com/feature/4547107962486784 entry.

design_system.rationale: Properly employs emerald ok badges, rose error indicators, and a clear monospace split grid layout.

openQuestions.title: Add missing chromestatus.com reference link
openQuestions.detail: Every concept page must include a link to the associated ChromeStatus entry. Add a link to https://chromestatus.com/feature/4547107962486784 at the bottom of the page.

summary: The compatibility-lab is a top-tier conformance checklist evaluating browser specs live, but fails compliance due to a missing ChromeStatus link.
